full_text:
Sun Ju 孫據
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Ju (孫據). Held high office due to being the younger brother of Sun Chen. Sun Ju was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Ju lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
